task_completion.description: The track originally named 'Audio 1' is renamed to 'Bumper'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Ardour editor window, the track header on the left side of the timeline displays the name 'Bumper'.

task_completion.description: The audio segment between 5.0 and 20.0 seconds is removed and the gap is closed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The audio region on the timeline shows a visible edit/join at the 5.0-second mark on the time ruler, and the entire audio region now ends at the 15.0-second mark.

task_completion.description: Fades of at least 0.1s are applied to the start and end of the bumper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible fade-in and fade-out indicators (shaded curves or diagonal lines at the top corners of the audio region) are present at the very beginning (0.0s) and the very end (15.0s) of the audio track.

task_completion.description: Markers named 'Edit Point' and 'Bumper End' are placed at the correct locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the marker ruler above the timeline, a marker labeled 'Edit Point' is visible at the 5.0s mark, and a marker labeled 'Bumper End' is visible at the 15.0s mark.

task_completion.description: The bumper is exported as a WAV file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Ardour export dialog showing successful export to '/home/ga/Audio/bumper_export/kpub_bumper.wav', or a terminal/file manager window showing the 'kpub_bumper.wav' file in the '/home/ga/Audio/bumper_export/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ardour GUI to perform the audio editing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Ardour application interface open with the audio track loaded and actively being modified in the timeline.

integrity.description: The exported file was generated via Ardour's export function.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ardour 'Export' dialog is visible in the screenshots, showing the correct settings and path, rather than terminal commands mocking the file creation.

integrity.description: Markers were created using Ardour's built-in marker functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Markers appear in the standard Ardour marker ruler with correct UI styling (flags/lines), not as superimposed text or external edits.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Track must be renamed to 'Bumper'. The edit point is at exactly 5.0 seconds (220500 samples at 44100 Hz). The removed segment is from 5.0s to 20.0s (882000 samples). Required markers: 'Edit Point' (at 5.0s) and 'Bumper End' (at the end of the final region, which should be 15.0s). Export path: /home/ga/Audio/bumper_export/kpub_bumper.wav. Minimum export size is 1024 bytes.
